raw_text:

They want a plain text record with three key=value lines. The fields, in order: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. So we need to output:

blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

Make sure no extra lines. Just those three lines. Probably also include the packet_id? The instruction says "Return the three-line status record." They gave the values. So just output exactly those three lines.

Thus answer:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

Make sure no additional commentary.
</think>

repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
